name: Pesto Tofu Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook manicotti shells according to package directions.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
3. Mash tofu cake with a fork in a large bowl, adding onion salt (texture should be similar to cottage cheese). Add green onions, bell pepper, mushrooms, and pesto sauce; mix well.
4. Drain manicotti and stuff each shell with the tofu-pesto mixture. Place side by side in a 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
5. Cover with spaghetti sauce. Top with soy mozzarella and sprinkle liberally with Italian seasoning.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
